entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the crop being studied for resistance to Ascochyta blight

entities.name: ASCOCHYTA BLIGHT
entities.description: A globally important foliar disease that limits the productivity of chickpea

entities.name: ASCOCHYTA RABIEI
entities.description: The pathogen that causes Ascochyta blight

entities.name: AB RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of chickpea to resist the Ascochyta blight pathogen

entities.name: LINKAGE MAPPING
entities.description: The process of constructing an intraspecific linkage map to identify QTLs

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple sequence repeat markers used for constructing linkage maps and validating QTLs

entities.name: EST MARKERS
entities.description: Expressed sequence tag markers used for constructing linkage maps

entities.name: QTL
entities.description: Quantitative trait loci that contribute to resistance to Ascochyta blight

entities.name: QTL1
entities.description: A specific QTL mapped to LG3 explaining 18.6% of phenotypic variance for AB resistance at adult plant stage

entities.name: QTL2
entities.description: A specific QTL mapped to LG4 accounting for 7.7% of phenotypic variance for AB resistance at seedling stage

entities.name: QTL3
entities.description: A specific QTL mapped to LG4 accounting for 9.3% of phenotypic variance for AB resistance at seedling stage

entities.name: TR58
entities.description: A marker linked to QTL1

entities.name: TA146
entities.description: A marker linked to QTL2 and associated with AB resistance at seedling stage

entities.name: TR20
entities.description: A marker linked to QTL2 and associated with AB resistance at seedling stage

entities.name: LG3
entities.description: Linkage group 3 where QTL1 is mapped

entities.name: LG4
entities.description: Linkage group 4 where QTL2 and QTL3 are mapped

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach utilizing markers linked to QTLs for trait improvement

entities.name: F2 POPULATION
entities.description: A population derived from a cross between AB susceptible and resistant parents used for mapping

entities.name: HALF-SIB POPULATION
entities.description: A population derived from the resistant parent ICCV 04516 used for marker validation

entities.name: ICC 4991
entities.description: An AB susceptible parent chickpea variety

entities.name: ICCV 04516
entities.description: An AB resistant parent chickpea variety
